changes: Item lookups by ID are now more reliable -- trailing spaces and case differences in EBMS item codes no longer cause misses
IntraMind no longer asks you to run a query yourself -- all queries run automatically and results are shown directly
All KPI dashboard cards now show a matching breakdown when clicked -- the drill-through number will always match the card
Payments received: drill-through now correctly excludes voided payments and refund rows, matching the KPI
Bills due this week: drill-through now shows only bills due within the next 7 days, not all open AP
Payroll: the KPI and drill-through now correctly exclude expense reimbursements, matching EBMS's own payroll report
Sales: drill-through now uses the same posted-invoice filter (statuses O and X) as the KPI card
Major accuracy pass on how answers are calculated -- a broad review corrected dozens of underlying data rules

Gross margin is now honest about cost data: if cost isn't recorded on most of your sales, IntraMind tells you that instead of reporting an inflated number, and explains when there are simply no tracked-item sales to measure
More reliable customer and vendor balances -- credit memos and overpayments are handled consistently, and voided payments no longer count as money received
Active/inactive filtering, payroll pay rates, job status, and quote status now match what you see in EBMS
Folder and product-line filtering is more precise (no more accidental matches from unrelated folders)
More reliable background updates
Clearer message when a margin question has no inventoried-product sales to measure -- now explains there are no tracked-item sales in the period instead of incorrectly saying there are no invoices
Major accuracy pass on how answers are calculated -- a broad review corrected dozens of underlying data rules
Gross margin is now honest about cost data: if cost isn't recorded on most of your sales, IntraMind tells you that instead of reporting an inflated number
More reliable customer and vendor balances -- credit memos and overpayments are handled consistently, and voided payments no longer count as money received
Active/inactive filtering, payroll pay rates, job status, and quote status now match what you see in EBMS
Folder and product-line filtering is more precise (no more accidental matches from unrelated folders)
Smarter answers to business questions like gross margin, most and least profitable products, and spending trends -- consistent calculations every time
Analytical answers now state how the number was calculated so you can check it against your own books
Honest about its limits -- questions it can't truly answer (like predicting churn) now point you to the closest real signal instead of guessing
Flags impossible results (like a margin over 100%) as likely data issues rather than reporting them as fact
Rate any answer with thumbs up or down -- tell us when a query gets something wrong
Failed queries are now reported automatically so we can fix them faster
Account menu button now shows a dropdown arrow so it's clearly clickable
Cleaner header -- live status, read-only note, and last-updated time consolidated into one chip
New account menu -- What's New, all updates, help and contact, and sign out in one place
What's New can now be reopened anytime from the account menu
Version number now links to the full update history
What's New dialog updated with correct brand colour and link to full update history at intramind.ca/updates
Fixed What's New not appearing on beta channel installs
Fixed folder queries returning 0 results -- items in named folders now correctly matched
Fixed What's New notification only showing for the first user to log in after an update
Fixed query errors on installs where multi-currency columns are not present
Fixed incorrect month resolution on follow-up queries
Fixed Days to Payment tile drill-down failing
Natural language folder queries now work (e.g. "items in my Parts folder")
Multi-currency awareness -- CAD and USD amounts no longer mixed in totals
Improved follow-up question context across the session
Automatic updates no longer require a GitHub token -- updates are now fully self-managing
SHA256 checksum verification on every update for integrity
What's New notifications now delivered with every update automatically
Cloudflare tunnel now automatically starts if stopped after an update
Cloudflared service configured with failure recovery — restarts automatically if it fails on boot
Log noise suppression: /health, /stats, and /logs polling no longer appears in agent.log
Portal token system: usage stats and log viewer now secured per-customer
Remote log viewer: admin portal can now pull server logs without RDP access
Usage tracking: queries today, this week, and active users visible in the admin portal
Multi-company support: switch between EBMS datasets at login (when multiple are configured)
Company name in header reflects the active dataset
Login now uses your EBMS username and password directly
Per-user permissions enforced based on your EBMS module access
Weak password warning shown after login if password doesn't meet security requirements
Initial release
Natural language queries against your EBMS database
AR, AP, inventory, payroll, job costing modules supported
